headline: Research Tools & Consumables Stocks Q4 Results: Benchmarking Revvity (NYSE:RVTY)
summary: The end of an earnings season can be a great time to discover new stocks and assess how companies are handling the current business environment. Let’s take a look at how Revvity (NYSE:RVTY) and the rest of the research tools & consumables stocks fared in Q4.
